LanguageData.UB_SNS__BrainShot.title: Execution Survivor
LanguageData.UB_SNS__BrainShot.description: Following a failed coup on their home system, [PAWN_nameDef] was lined up among many others, and was one by one shot in the back of the head. [PAWN_nameDef] miraculously survived and managed to tend to [PAWN_possessive] major wounds, and survive their execution. [PAWN_nameDef] lived in solitude, in their tyrannical governments hidden communities, considered legally dead.
